ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stock data was updated */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the exchange */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "trading_days" TEXT /* Days on which the exchange operates */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the exchange data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on that day */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock on that day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on that day */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Stock split ratio if applicable */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trading data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
